profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and password

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Manage equipment models
models.connectionScriptHelp: Commands executed by workers when connecting via SSH to a device of this model. Use ^X notation for control keys (e.g. ^Y for Ctrl+Y, ^C for Ctrl+C)
models.connectionScriptPlaceholder:
terminal length 0
show running-config
show version
models.sendCtrlCharHelp: Sends a control character before the connection script. Required on some legacy devices to reach the prompt.
models.noCollectionCommands: No collection commands associated with this model
models.collectionSubtitle: Commands automatically and manually associated with this model
models.noCollectionRules: No collection rules associated with this model
models.rulesSubtitle: Rules automatically and manually associated with this model
models.monitoringSubtitle: Configure SNMP OIDs for monitoring devices of this model. Each indicator can be individually enabled or disabled.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.subtitle: Manage equipment connection profiles
profiles.cliEnablePasswordHelp: Password for privileged mode (Cisco enable, etc.)
profiles.noSnmpCredentials: No SNMP credentials for this context
profiles.noCliCredentials: No CLI credentials for this context

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.subtitle: Manage network equipment nodes
nodes.settingsDesc: Configure the node's network, hardware, and tag settings.
nodes.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting this node and all its data is irreversible.
nodes.compliancePlaceholder: Compliance data will appear here after the first audit
nodes.collectDescription: Execute all collection commands associated with this node's model and store the results.
nodes.collectTagHelp: If the tag already exists, it will be moved from the previous collection to this one.
nodes.noMonitoringDataHint: Make sure the node's model has monitoring OIDs configured and the profile has an SNMP credential.
nodes.monitoringRetention: Data retained for the last {minutes} minutes
nodes.inventoryEmpty: No inventory data. Run a collection to extract data.
nodes.confirmDeleteCollection: Delete this collection and all its files?
nodes.confirmDeleteCollections: Delete {count} collection(s) and all their files?

collection_commands.title: Collection commands
collection_commands.subtitle: Manage SSH commands executed on equipment to collect data
collection_commands.name: Name
collection_commands.commandsHelp: One command per line, executed sequentially via SSH

collection_rules.title: Collection rules
collection_rules.subtitle: Define data extraction rules from collection results
collection_rules.name: Name
collection_rules.sourceHelp: Choose where the data for this rule comes from
collection_rules.commandHelp: The command whose output will be used for extraction
collection_rules.tagHelp: Retrieve the result of the command from a specific tagged collection instead of the latest
collection_rules.extractCaptureGroupsHelp: Select the key group and define labels for value columns
collection_rules.extractNodeFieldHelp: The first match found will be used to update the node field
collection_rules.inventoryEmpty: No extraction rules configured or no matches found

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Collection history for all nodes in the context
collections.confirmDelete: Delete {count} collection(s) and all their files?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Settings for context {name}
settings.monitoringHelp: Automatically monitor equipment configurations in this context
settings.retentionHelp: Configure how long SNMP monitoring data is kept. Older data will be automatically deleted.
settings.icmpIntervalHelp: How often ICMP pings are sent to devices. Minimum 5 seconds.
settings.pollIntervalHelp: How often SNMP data is collected from devices. Minimum 5 seconds.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Manage tags to organize your nodes

compliance_rules.title: Compliance rules
compliance_rules.subtitle: Define rules to verify the compliance of your equipment
compliance_rules.name: Name
compliance_rules.folderHelp: Move this rule to another folder in the tree
compliance_rules.datasourceHelp: Select the data source used to evaluate this rule
compliance_rules.datasourceNoneDesc: No data source is configured for this rule
compliance_rules.dsSSHDesc: Connects directly to the device via SSH/Telnet to execute the command and retrieve the result in real time
compliance_rules.dsValueHelp: Leave empty to use "Value#1" by default
compliance_rules.dsTagHelp: Leave empty to use the latest collection
compliance_rules.dsValueMapHelp: Map regex capture groups to labels to structure the results
compliance_rules.dsNoGroups: Enter a regular expression with capture groups to configure mappings
compliance_rules.dsCaptureOnly: Group mapping is only available in Capture mode
compliance_rules.dsGroupKeyHelp: Select a group as key to identify each result row
compliance_rules.conditionsHelp: Define the conditions for compliance evaluation
compliance_rules.conditionsNotAppliedDesc: No conditions are configured for this rule
compliance_rules.noSourceWarning: Configure a data source before adding conditions
compliance_rules.evaluateSelectNode: Select a device to evaluate this rule
compliance_rules.helpBlocksDesc: Build your logic with conditional blocks. The first block is always an IF. Add ELSE IF blocks to test other conditions, and an ELSE block as a default case. The first block whose conditions are met determines the result.
compliance_rules.helpLogicDesc: Within a block, combine multiple conditions with AND (all must be true) or OR (at least one must be true). Click the AND/OR badge to toggle.
compliance_rules.helpNestingDesc: Nest IF blocks inside an existing block to create complex decision trees. The nesting button replaces the parent block's result with a sub-tree of conditions.
compliance_rules.helpResultDesc: Each terminal branch defines a status: Compliant, Non-compliant, Error, or Not applicable. Add an explanatory message for each result.
compliance_rules.helpMultiRowDesc: When the data source returns multiple rows (capture mode with multiple matches), conditions are evaluated independently for each row. The overall result corresponds to the worst result among all rows.
compliance_rules.helpSeverityDesc: In case of non-compliance, define a severity (Info, Low, Medium, High, Critical) that will impact the equipment's compliance score. In multi-row mode, the highest severity is retained.
compliance_rules.multiRowDesc: Define a global message for each status when the rule is evaluated in multi-row mode. These messages replace individual condition messages in the aggregated result.
compliance_rules.multiRowMsgPlaceholder: Message to display for this status...

compliance_policies.title: Compliance policies
compliance_policies.subtitle: Manage compliance policies to audit your equipment
compliance_policies.noRulesInPolicyDesc: Add rules to this policy's folder from the compliance rules page.
compliance_policies.noNodesInPolicyDesc: Add nodes individually or by tag combination.
compliance_policies.addByTagsDesc: Select one or more tags. All nodes that have all selected tags will be added to the policy.
compliance_policies.noResultsDesc: Run an evaluation to check the compliance of nodes.
compliance_policies.confirmDeleteResults: Are you sure you want to delete all evaluation results for this policy?
compliance_policies.importWarningDuplicate: A policy with this name already exists. The import will create a new separate entry.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.noResultsDesc: Run an evaluation to check the compliance of this device.
compliance.legendCompliant: The rule is compliant — the device meets the requirement.
compliance.legendNonCompliant: The rule is non-compliant — the device does not meet the requirement.
compliance.legendError: Error — the rule could not be evaluated (connection failure, missing data, etc.).
compliance.legendNotApplicable: Not applicable — no data source or evaluation conditions configured.
compliance.scoreCalculationDesc: The score is calculated from the compliance results of all associated policies. Each non-compliant or error rule incurs a penalty based on its severity. Rules with status "not applicable" or "skipped" are excluded from the calculation.
compliance.scoreFormula: Score = (Max penalty - Actual penalty) / Max penalty × 100
compliance.scoreMaxPenalty: Max penalty = Number of evaluated rules × 10

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Create and manage audit reports
reports.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting this report and all its data is irreversible.
reports.generatingDesc: The report is currently being generated. Please wait...
reports.noDocument: No document available. Generate the report to view it.
reports.noAuthors: No authors. Add authors for the distribution page.
reports.noRevisions: No versions. Add entries for the revision history.
reports.noRecipients: No recipients. Add people for the distribution list.
reports.typeGeneralDesc: General report, not linked to a specific node
reports.typeNodeDesc: Report generated for each associated node

report_themes.title: Report themes
report_themes.subtitle: Manage visual themes for your reports
report_themes.tocDotLeader: Dot leaders between title and page number
report_themes.lineSpacingDesc: Spacing before and after each line (p tag) inside a paragraph block.
report_themes.blockSpacingDesc: Space between two consecutive paragraph blocks.
report_themes.groupSpacingDesc: Space before the first and after the last block of a paragraph group (or single block).
report_themes.marginsDesc: Set the margins applied to all pages of the document (in millimeters).
report_themes.importWarningDuplicate: A theme with this name already exists. The import will create a duplicate.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Automated task scheduling
schedules.name: Name
schedules.cleanupDesc: Deletes collections without tags (old collections whose 'latest' tag was removed)
schedules.noSchedulesDesc: Create a schedule to automate tasks
schedules.dangerZoneDesc: This action is irreversible. All data related to this schedule will be permanently deleted.

coverPage.emptyCanvas: Add elements from the left panel
coverPage.noSelection: Select an element to edit its properties

structure.empty: Add blocks to structure your document
structure.noSelection: Select a block to edit its properties
structure.caption: Caption
structure.inventoryPreviewNote: Values will be populated during report generation
structure.inventoryFontSizeHint: Leave empty to inherit theme font size
structure.inventoryPreviewEmpty: Add columns and equipment to see the preview
structure.ruleHint: Rules are evaluated in order. The first match is applied.
structure.cliLineFilterHint: Specify lines to show (e.g. 1-5,8,10-12). Empty = show all.
structure.cliFontSizeHint: Leave empty to inherit theme CMD style size
structure.cliRuleHint: Regex-based rules applied per line. First match wins.
structure.cliSourceRemoteDesc: The command will be executed remotely during generation.
structure.cliConditionalHint: Define regex rules to show or hide this block in the PDF based on the command output.
structure.cliConditionalEmpty: No conditional rules. The block will always be displayed.
